meaning: n.[植]中生植物(指在中等湿度条件下生长的植物)
examples: Gramineae life form was made up of perennial plant and annual plant and the ecotype was consisted of mesophyte and xerophyte.
The results showed that the leaves of W. indica exhibited morphological characteristics of xerophytism, heliophyte with mesophyte.
The population of Sabina vulgaris are mainly typical mesophyte, secondly the xerophytes, super- xerophytes; the proportion of Phreatophyte is very small.
